{{Quote|Convinced yet! You know, they won the Battle of Binquaros, right?|[[Pog]], about [[ThunderForce]]|<ref name="H&S">''[[Hideouts & Strongholds]]''</ref>}}
The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of '''Binquaros''' was located in the [[Ciutric sector/Legends|Ciutric sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
Following the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], many [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] forces retreated to Binquaros which became a [[Separatist holdouts/Legends|Separatist]] stronghold. The planet was [[Siege of Binquaros|besieged]] by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces led by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Hurst Romodi/Legends|Hurst Romodi]]. The siege was eventually [[Battle of Binquaros|broken]] by [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] and [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] reinforcements that allowed the Separatists to flee to the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]].<ref name="TEGtW" />
